turns.name: WILLIAM H. REHNQUIST
turns.text: We have another opinion to announce which I ommitted will be announced by Justice White.

turns.name: BYRON R. WHITE
turns.text: And As usual it won't take long. For the reason stated in an opinion filed with the Clerk, the judgment of the Court of Apeals for the Eleventh Circuit is affirmed. Justice Thomas who is joined by Justice Souter has filed an opinion concurring in part and dissenting in part. Thank you Mr. Chief Justice.
